scripts.generate: formatjs extract '../../apps/{site,spa}/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}' '../../packages/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}' --ignore '../../**/{node_modules,out,.next,storybook-static,dist,.turbo}/**/*' --ignore '../../**/*.d.ts' --out-file src/en.json --format crowdin && formatjs compile-folder --ast --format crowdin ./src ./dist
